client_context.company_stance: Risk-averse; service level protection is top priority over cost.
client_context.sustainability_goals: Reduce airfreight where possible; prefer ocean and regional suppliers; CO2 reporting required for executive decisions.
client_context.financial_constraints: CAPEX approvals > €100K require CFO; no single PO > €500K without board memo.
client_context.legal_notes: BMW and VW contracts require 98% and 97% on-time delivery; penalties $50K and $35K per day. No dual-source obligation for SEMI-MCU-32 but preferred.
client_context.scm_team_inputs: Prefer buffer build over spot market for quality traceability; alternate supplier must be IATF 16949.
